zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith Neville於大約1478年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉內拉爾時，她的父親Robert Neville I29歲，母親Joanna Woodford25歲。她於1503年之前與Anthony Staunton在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1569年1月21日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith Neville于大约1478年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉內拉爾时，她的父亲Robert Neville I29岁，母亲Joanna Woodford25岁。她于1503年之前与Anthony Staunton在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1569年1月21日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edyth
meanings: Variant spelling of   Edith .

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith Neville was born about 1478, in Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Neville I, was 29 and her mother, Joanna Woodford, was 25. She married Anthony Staunton before 1503, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 21 January 1569, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92.

Elle a épousé Anthony Staunton avant 1503, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 janvier 1569, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Edith Neville(이)가 대략 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라그널에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Neville I(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Woodford(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1503년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Anthony Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1569년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Anthony Staunton antes 1503, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith Neville родилась около 1478 г. в местности рагналл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Neville I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Woodford, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anthony Staunton перед 1503 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 21 января 1569 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет.

Se casó con Anthony Staunton antes de 1503, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas.
